title: dianthus carthusianorum subsp. polonicus
intro: Dianthus carthusianorum subsp. polonicus, also known as the Carthusian pink, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caryophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Dianthus carthusianorum subsp. polonicus include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and it is often used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
